arts.ttl: Maresca vs Chelsea: Manager critical of 'bad' Acheampong situation
arts.sum: If the way Chelsea treated Conor Gallagher and Trevoh Chalobah in the summer wasn't bad enough, they have now outdone themselves, by essentially telling 18-year-old Josh Acheampong that he will never again play for the club at any level unless he signs a new contract . Enzo Maresca has admitted that it is a'shame' that Josh Acheampong has been frozen out at Chelsea .

arts.ttl: Chelsea get fresh PSR hope as superstar lawyer hired to unlock £518m transfer spend
Chelsea sent brutal Mykhailo Mudryk message after £88m transfer disaster
arts.sum: The Gunners were heavily linked with the frontman and Mudryk wanted the deal, but late in the day Chelsea came in and blew Arsenal out of the water with their offer and Mudryk signed in west London instead. The Ukrainian was a January 2023 arrival at Chelsea, with the Blues splashing out a transfer fee that could rise to £88million for the forward.

arts.ttl: Team News: Panathinaikos vs. Chelsea injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Thursday's Conference League clash between Panathinaikos and Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca confirms £20m Chelsea player will come into the starting XI vs Panathinaikos
arts.sum: Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca has shared an early piece of team news for Thursday’s European game away to Panathinaikos. The Blues are now in Athens...

arts.ttl: 'Enzo explained': Cole Palmer shares conversation he had with Maresca about not playing in Conference League
Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca comments on Josh Acheampong situation, questions representatives
arts.sum: Chelsea head coach Enzo Maresca admits that Josh Acheampong's contract standoff with the Blues hierarchy is "a bad situation" for all involved.

arts.ttl: £20m attacker who was happy to leave Chelsea just scored directly from a corner in the Champions League
arts.sum: Given Chelsea are not currently in the Champions League, supporters are having to watch players who left the club make their own mark in the...

arts.ttl: Chelsea travelling squad for Panathinaikos revealed as Enzo Maresca makes Reece James decision
arts.sum: Four academy graduates have made the trip to Greece, with Lucas Bergstrom, Samuel Rak-Sakyi, Tyrique George and Shumaira Mheuka, who only turned 17 on Sunday, hoping to feature. Chelsea have confirmed their 22-man squad making the trip to Greece ahead of the UEFA Conference League clash with Panathinaikos.

arts.ttl: Chelsea team news: Enzo Maresca rests five more senior players for Panathinaikos Conference League game
arts.sum: Chelsea head coach Enzo Maresca decides to rest five more senior players for Thursday's Conference League fixture against Panathinaikos.
